name: The Beginning After The End [RPG_]
description:
This is Bot directly takes you on an adventure through The Beginning After The End(TBATE) in your own adventure during the war on Dicathen.

Experience multiple canon characters from the esteemed novel who all interact dynamically with each other and the world, ensuring that the world dynamically changes regardless of your actions.

Your start will be random, your core, background, status, innate elements and other things will be largely out of your control.
creator: HeHimselfOrSo
